LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GREEN TREE SERVICING LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFFS THE OPPORTUNITY, IF THEY ARE ABLE TO DO SO, TO ALLEGE A FRAUD CLAIM WITH PARTICULARITY AND ANY OTHER CLAIMS WITH SUFFICIENT CLARITY TO PERMIT DEFENDANT TO RESPOND. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GREEN TREE SERVICING LLC DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Kalama M. Lui-Dwan, of Severson & Werson (415) 398-3344, appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Counsel gave notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR# 7235

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Continued To Feb-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GREEN TREE SERVICING LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend to give the plaintiffs the opportunity, if they are able to do so, to allege a fraud claim with particularity and any other claims with sufficient clarity to permit defendant to respond. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/HEK)JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235
